name: critup-video
description: Remotion video compositions for Critup.AI ad

scripts.render:mascot: npx remotion render src/index.ts Mascot out/mascot.mp4   --codec=prores
scripts.render:scores: npx remotion render src/index.ts Scores out/scores.mp4   --codec=prores
scripts.render:chat: npx remotion render src/index.ts Chat   out/chat.mp4     --codec=prores
scripts.render:jury: npx remotion render src/index.ts Jury   out/jury.mp4     --codec=prores
scripts.render:all: mkdir -p out && npm run render:mascot && npm run render:scores && npm run render:chat && npm run render:jury
